ddls:
CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "database_version" TEXT /* Version of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the database */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the database (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_types" (
  "index_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index type */,
  "index_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the index type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index type */,
  "index_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the index type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the index belongs to */,
  "index_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index type */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "unique" INTEGER /* Whether the index is unique or not */,
  "index_size" INTEGER /* Size of the index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the index */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexes_index_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_type_id") REFERENCES index_types ("index_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexes_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index the metadata belongs to */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the metadata */,
  "digest_length" INTEGER /* Digest length of the metadata */,
  "key_length" INTEGER /* Key length of the metadata */,
  "fanout" INTEGER /* Fanout of the metadata */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the metadata */,
  "metadata_version" INTEGER /* Version of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the metadata */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_metadata_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "table_types" (
  "table_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table type */,
  "table_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the table type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table type */,
  "table_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the table type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "table1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first table in the relationship */,
  "table2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second table in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., one-to-one, one-to-many) */,
  "relationship_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., database administrator, analyst, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_relationships" (
  "user_relationship_id" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  "user_id" INTEGER,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER,
  FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES "users" ("user_id"),
  FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES "relationships" ("relationship_id")
)
